title: fagelia involuta
intro: Fagelia involuta is a flowering plant native to South Africa, known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant is often used for its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Fagelia involuta include its ability to reduce inflammation and ease muscle spasms, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Fagelia involuta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or inhaled to release its therapeutic properties.
